_**Agent (claude-opus-4-7 2026-05-30 10:24:36Z)**_

No security findings. This change is a purely presentational refactor of a static React mockup (`docs/vercel_mockup/src/MOCKUP.jsx`):

- Adds two `useState` booleans (`showMoreFilters`, `showKpis`) for collapse/expand UI state.
- Replaces a Status `<select>` with segmented "Pending/Approved/Rejected/All" tab buttons, all wired to the existing `setStatusFilter` setter with hardcoded keys (no user-supplied values).
- Collapses KPI tiles and Date/Vessel filters behind mobile disclosure buttons; desktop table view is removed in favor of a responsive card grid.
- Restyles the Reject modal as a bottom sheet on mobile.

No new entry points, no new sinks, no changes to `approve`, `openReject`, `confirmReject`, or `setRejectReason` data flow. The status-tab `key` values are literal constants in code, not attacker-controlled. No auth, no template/HTML injection (text is rendered via JSX text nodes), no shell/SQL/path/network sinks introduced.
